name: Palak Tofu-Paneer
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Firm tofu, drained and cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the firm tofu and soy sauce in a bowl.
2. Heat oil to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
3. Drain excess soy sauce from tofu cubes.
4. Drop tofu cubes into heated oil all at once or in batches, frying until browned and slightly crisp on the outside.
5. Remove tofu cubes from oil and drain on a plate covered with 2-3 layers of paper towels. Save leftover soy sauce for later use.
6. In a skillet, combine frozen chopped spinach (add water to cover), cover, and simmer over medium flame for 10 minutes until thawed and mixable.
7. Uncover and add remaining ghee or oil to the skillet. Add spices and toast them in the oil until fragrant and lightly browned.
8. Immediately pour the spice mixture into the vegetables, add soy sauce, and stir thoroughly until tomatoes break down.
9. Turn off heat, add cooked tofu cubes, cover, and let rest for a few minutes before serving. Makes 8 entree-sized servings or twice as many side dish-sized servings.
